3129780.name: Angry Chef World Tour
3129780.description:
⚠️ Warning:

If you’re emotionally fragile, easily offended, your tolerance is low, perhaps this game is NOT for you. The chefs shouts for sport, the chaos never stops, and your emotions will be lightly seasoned and thoroughly roasted. The chefs have zero patience, the kitchen has zero mercy, and your feelings have zero chance. Players beware! 

🔥 ANGRY CHEF: WORLD TOUR IS UNLEASHED.

Welcome to the full, maximum-volume, feature-loaded culinary crisis we always intended to give you. Prepare for utter chaos and content that stretches across the globe!

🌍 EXPLORE CHAOTIC KITCHENS WORLDWIDE

Explore kitchens from all around the world. Each destination brings::

  • Unique Art & Music: New visuals and soundtracks to reflect the regional cuisine and stress.

  • Insane Challenges: Every level packs fun game mechanics that challenge you in the most disrespectful ways. Good luck! These challenges don’t care about your feelings.

  • Global Chef Gauntlet: You’ll face chefs from around the world one meltdown at a time. Survive a nation’s angry kitchen boss before the next global disaster unlocks.

  • Animal Collectables: Collect a ridiculous cast of animals whose only job is to mess with the chefs at the worst possible moments. They don’t help you. They don’t hinder you.
    They just cause chaos for everyone else.

  • Daily Play: Daily Play gives you a Unique Challenging Levels every 24 hours... same game, totally different meltdown. It’s quick, fun, and guaranteed to ruin your morning in the most entertaining way possible.

  • Leaderboard: Climb the global Leaderboard to earn bragging rights AND actual in-game prizes the chefs swear you shouldn’t have. Beat other players time→ rise in rank → win cool stuff → watch the chef spiral into disbelief.

🧩 THREE GAME MODES. ONE EXPLOSIVE EXPERIENCE.

Forget Mild Mode. You now have three distinct ways to test your sanity against the timer:

🔥 Match-2 “Kitchen Chaos Mixer”

Fast, loud, and about as calm as a blender with no lid.
Match pairs as quickly as you can before the chef starts yelling in international languages you definitely don’t speak. Easy to learn, impossible to relax during.

🀄 Mahjong “Tile Stacking Meltdown”

A classic… if classics screamed at you for being too slow.
Clear the board by matching tiles while trying not to panic. It’s peaceful in theory, chaotic in practice, and your chef has zero sympathy for mistakes.

🂦 Solitaire “Card-Flipping Stress Test”

It’s you versus a deck of cards that hates you.
Sort, stack, and solve your way through a culinary-themed solitaire challenge. Perfect for players who enjoy strategy, patience, and occasionally questioning their life choices.

If you are still not sure go play the Demo for FREE!
3129780.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
